title: DarknessUI
description: Dark themed Resource Pack GUI, Blocks and Items with mods support.
body: **DarknessUI** is a resource pack that aims to bring a dark theme to the interfaces and blocks of various mods, with support for more mods to come. This resource pack is meant to be used as a complementary of **Improved Applied Energistics 2** and **Unique Dark** as they fill the gaps that this don't cover. **Mod Support List: (at this moment)** - Applied Energistics - Mega Cells - Extended AE - Applied Energistics Wireless Terminals - Iron Chests - Me Resquester **Planned Support:** - JEI - Tom's Simple Storage **If you want support for a specific mod, you can ask me on Discord: @Zetherion**
